subject: [PATCH v2 1/9] nfsd: fix BUG_ON in nfsd4_alloc_layout_stateid on racing delegation revoke

2026-05-30.patch_summary: This patch fixes a race condition in the NFSv4 server that can cause a BUG_ON when trying to allocate a layout stateid for a delegated file. The issue occurs when a concurrent delegation revoke is triggered, causing the fi_deleg_file pointer to be cleared under the fi_lock lock. To fix this, the patch takes an RCU read lock around the fi_deleg_file read in the SC_TYPE_DELEG path and replaces the BUG_ON with a graceful error return that cleans up any partially initialized layout stateid. This ensures that the NFS server can handle concurrent delegation revokes without crashing.
